CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
E02:00MOMx8 Sets:
2 Squat Cleans, Build Up for Load

Metcon:
16:00 Min EMOM For Max Reps:
1.) WallWalks
2.) Air Squats
3.)Russian KB Swings #32/24kg
4.)Walking Lunges

CrossFit Endurance
E06:00MOMx6 Rounds:
30 2DB Deadlifts #2x15/10kg
20 2DB STOH
30 Sit-ups
20 2DB Front Rack Squats
*Max Reps Shuttle Runs
1Rep=2x7.5m For The Remaining
